name: Start-Your-Own-Bakery Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, butter, and sugars in a large mixing bowl until thoroughly blended, about 5 minutes at high speed.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla and lemon juice.
4. Combine the flour, oats, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
5. Mix the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture until well combined.
6. Fold in the chocolate morsels and pecans.
7. Drop rounded 1/4 cup portions of dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet about 3 inches apart.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes.
9. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for about 30 seconds before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Makes about 36 cookies.
